reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are the best, but the prices are high.

reviews.comment:
Antes habia carteles sobre la existencia de leyes sobre como el estacionamiento deberían hacer los conductores desaprensivos y personal del lugar que debe recordarlo al cliente del lugar siempre.
Es lugar con peligroso espacio público y debió el dueño referir esto con carteles al efecto.
Baños sin anaquel separado entre mingitorios
Hasta el techo.
Aire turbo para secar manos.
Mantener calles y malogra el motociclista el correcto recorrido.
Colocar rejas a la noche en la entrada, con abrir automático ayudará a evitar problemas

(Translated by Google)
Previously, there were signs informing customers about parking laws, and staff should have reminded them of these rules. The area is dangerous, and the owner should have posted signs indicating this. The restrooms lack shelves between urinals and are stacked all the way to the ceiling. There's a turbo air dryer for hands. Maintaining the streets is problematic, as it disrupts the motorcyclist's route. Installing automatic gates at the entrance at night would help prevent problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmd3FuTzBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención por parte de todo el personal,desde el playero,la cajera y la señor de limpieza. Los baños un espejo!!! Volvería mil veces, súper recomendable!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from all the staff, from the attendant to the cashier and the cleaning lady. The restrooms were spotless! I would return a thousand times, highly recommended!
